concerns.text: The spec retains the unresolved 'Handling Missing Data' concern from the kickback. FR-002 and US-01 state that entries missing thermodynamic data are 'excluded from the thermodynamic model but retained for the composition-only baseline.' This creates a selection bias (training the Thermo model on a subset of alloys with MP data, while the Baseline uses the full set), violating the fair comparison required by the research question. The spec must mandate that the Baseline model is trained on the SAME subset of data as the Thermo model to isolate the feature effect, or explicitly define an imputation strategy for missing thermodynamic data.
